themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 15 verses. Commentary leans on "If he offer it for a thanksgiving, then he shall offer with the sacrifice of thanksgiving unl...". Word-study detail reinforces "הַשְּׁלָמִ֑ים: of peace offerings - properly, requital, i.e., a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks".

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "Besides the cakes, he shall offer for his offering leavened bread with the sacrifice of thank...". Word-study detail reinforces "לֶ֣חֶם: bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And the flesh that toucheth any unclean thing shall not be eaten; it shall be burnt with fire...". Cross references echo "Holy".
